---
title: "Projects"
---

## Youth unemployment rates

![*`The nationwide trend of the unemployment rates`*](images/plot1.png){fig-align="center" width="512"}

*Used to visualize Youth unemployment rates in Kenya by;*

*Gender*

*Area type*

*Education status*

*Education attendance*

**Tools:** *Rstudio*

**Packages:** *tidyverse, ggplot2*

[View project](https://github.com/Albee03/Youth_unemployement)

## Effectiveness of Various feed types on Chick Weights

![*`Average weights of chicks by type of feed`*](images/Average%20weights.png){fig-align="center" width="500"}

Aims at analyzing which types of feeds have great impact on newly chicks

**Tools:** *Rstudio*

**Packages:** *tidyverse, DT*

[View project](https://rpubs.com/Drool_bee/1412511){style="green"}
